item.ptxt: Avoid touching the stroke portions of the rod as much as possible to prevent foreign matter from attaching to the stroke portions. Be sure to hold the cylinders while servicing.
Do not wear cotton gloves or other similar materials when handling the rod. Fibers may attach to the rod and result in gas leaks.
Do not apply any load to the cylinders in the horizontal direction in order to prevent the rod from being deformed.

s2.ptxt: Using a screwdriver, disengage the 2 clips and remove the hood support assembly.

atten3.ptxt: Remove the hood support assembly while supporting the hood by hand.
